metadata.purpose: Stable hand-curated evidence cache for FAM revenue overlays.

branding_lift_analysis.title: How brands use MMM to find and fuel their growth engine
branding_lift_analysis.quote: Brand and performance should be measured together because upper-funnel investment can lift downstream efficiency.

branding_lift_analysis.title: Marketing measurement handbook
branding_lift_analysis.quote: Measurement should connect incremental impact and future scaling decisions rather than only last-click outcomes.

marketing_efficiency_analysis.title: 2025 CPL and CAC Benchmarks
marketing_efficiency_analysis.quote: CAC and CPL vary widely by channel, so scaling should follow economics that are already proven.

marketing_efficiency_analysis.title: How brands use MMM to find and fuel their growth engine
marketing_efficiency_analysis.quote: Brand demand improves the efficiency of direct-response media when the mix is coordinated.

sales_efficiency_analysis.title: 2024 B2B Sales Benchmarks
sales_efficiency_analysis.quote: Higher-performing sales teams pair stronger win rates with shorter cycles and better pipeline quality.

sales_efficiency_analysis.title: 2024 B2B Sales Benchmarks: H1 Update
sales_efficiency_analysis.quote: Sales productivity depends on converting qualified pipeline efficiently rather than adding volume alone.

partner_strategy_analysis.title: The Business Case for Modern Partner Enablement
partner_strategy_analysis.quote: Enablement quality influences partner-sourced revenue, ramp speed, and ongoing partner productivity.

partner_strategy_analysis.title: 2024 B2B Sales Benchmarks
partner_strategy_analysis.quote: Channel quality and deal progression matter as much as raw lead count in B2B sales outcomes.

staged_acceleration_analysis.title: Marketing measurement handbook
staged_acceleration_analysis.quote: Teams should validate incrementality and economics before scaling spend aggressively.

staged_acceleration_analysis.title: The easy formula to calculate true CAC across all your marketing channels
staged_acceleration_analysis.quote: True CAC should be understood across channels before larger investment is committed.

validation_period_analysis.title: Marketing measurement handbook
validation_period_analysis.quote: Early-stage validation should focus on incrementality, not vanity metrics.

acceleration_period_analysis.title: How brands use MMM to find and fuel their growth engine
acceleration_period_analysis.quote: Once the growth engine is understood, mix decisions can support scaling with more confidence.

acceleration_period_analysis.title: 2025 CPL and CAC Benchmarks
acceleration_period_analysis.quote: Channel economics should guide where incremental spend is added during scale-up.

gated_acceleration_analysis.title: Marketing measurement handbook
gated_acceleration_analysis.quote: Measurement guardrails are needed before increasing investment materially.

gated_acceleration_analysis.title: The easy formula to calculate true CAC across all your marketing channels
gated_acceleration_analysis.quote: CAC visibility gives teams a practical gate for deciding when to scale.
